Dormitory Applications Have Started

08.09.2021

The dormitory applications for the 2021-2022 Academic Year will take place between 8-12 September. Dormitory application results will be announced on Wednesday, September 15

You can access the dormitory application page via the link below. You can also find answers to your questions about dormitories via the frequently asked questions link below.

Deadline for applications: 12th September 2021 Sunday 5.00 p.m.

Please click here fordormitory application.

Click here for the frequently asked questions page.
